sprint.title: Featurebase Widgets v1: Feedback + Changelog + Messenger Widget + Embedded Portal
sprint.goal: Embed Featurebase widgets into Memorioso: Feedback widget (bugs/ideas), Changelog widget (what’s new), and the Messenger widget for quick in-app support/feedback entry. Add clean entry points in Studio and Dashboard, theme them for dark UI, and optionally embed the full portal in a dedicated page.
definitionOfDone: Featurebase Feedback widget installed and usable in-app (submit idea/bug without leaving)
Featurebase Changelog widget installed and accessible from Studio + Dashboard
Featurebase Messenger widget installed for quick help/feedback entry (floating button/launcher)
Widgets match Memorioso dark theme and do not interfere with Studio interactions
Optional: /feedback page embeds Featurebase portal (roadmap + feedback browsing) via iframe
Widgets are loaded only in the authenticated app shell (not on marketing pages) unless explicitly desired
Basic telemetry events recorded for opens/submissions (no PII)
QA checklist completed and minimal tests added (script load + launcher availability)

stackAssumptions.featurebase: Workspace already created; free tier usage
stackAssumptions.theme: Memorioso uses dark UI in Studio

backlog.title: Confirm Featurebase widget capabilities + free-tier constraints + placements

research: Verify which widgets are available on free tier (Feedback, Changelog, Messenger, Embedded portal)
Verify any limits (boards/projects, custom domains, branding, screenshot support)
placements: Studio: Help menu + optional floating launcher
constraints: Must remain compatible with free tier

acceptanceTests: A constraints + placements doc exists and matches what you can enable in Featurebase

backlog.title: Add a safe widget loader (script injection) gated to app shell routes only

loader: Load Featurebase widget script once (singleton) on authenticated app layout
Do not load on landing/SEO pages by default
constraints: Avoid double-injecting script on route transitions

acceptanceTests: Script loads exactly once and widgets initialize
No console errors during route changes

backlog.title: Install Featurebase Feedback widget and wire 'Send feedback' entry points (Studio + Dashboard)

widgetConfig: Optional custom fields: storybookId, chapterKey, route, browser
constraints: Do not include story text or PII in custom fields

acceptanceTests: User can open feedback widget and submit a post
Custom context fields are included (safe metadata only)

backlog.title: Install Featurebase Changelog widget (What’s new) with badge/dot indicator

behavior: Show new-item badge if supported (or store lastSeenChangelogAt locally)

acceptanceTests: Changelog widget opens and shows latest posts
Badge indicator works (native or local last-seen)

backlog.title: Install Featurebase Messenger widget (floating launcher) + Studio-safe positioning

messenger: Enable Featurebase Messenger widget and render launcher in-app
Position: bottom-right by default, but avoid overlapping Studio controls
Hide/minimize while in critical edit modes (e.g., crop sidebar open) if needed
studioSafety: Ensure launcher does not capture drag gestures on canvas
constraints: Must not degrade performance or cause layout shift
Do not show on landing pages unless desired

acceptanceTests: Messenger widget appears and can be opened/closed
It does not interfere with selection/dragging in Studio

backlog.title: Theme matching (dark mode): widget styling guidelines + fallback

theme: Match Memorioso dark palette for widget container if supported
Ensure readable contrast and accessible font sizes
Fallback: keep default widget theme but wrap with minimal framing UI
constraints: Do not hack internal widget DOM aggressively (brittle)

acceptanceTests: Widgets remain readable on dark background

backlog.title: Optional: /feedback page embedding Featurebase portal (roadmap + feedback) via iframe

behavior: Embed portal in iframe with responsive sizing
Add safe external link fallback if iframe blocked
constraints: Do not embed on landing SEO pages
Keep authentication boundaries clear (public portal can be public, but app route is private unless you choose otherwise)

acceptanceTests: Fallback link works if iframe fails

backlog.title: Telemetry hooks (no PII): widget_opened, feedback_submitted, changelog_opened, messenger_opened
QA + minimal tests (loader singleton, launchers available, studio non-interference)

manualChecklist: Studio: open feedback widget, submit, close
Studio: messenger launcher opens and does not block canvas drag
Dashboard: feedback and changelog entry points work
automation: Unit: loader injects script only once

acceptanceTests: At least 2 automated tests added and passing

notes: Use a singleton loader and only load widgets inside authenticated app pages to keep marketing pages fast and avoid SEO noise.
Ensure the Messenger launcher doesn’t overlap or interfere with Studio canvas interactions.
